title: On nilpotent and solvable Malcev algebras
journal: Proceedings of the American Mathematical Society
abstract: Solvable and nilpotent Malcev algebras are investigated in the spirit of extending results from Lie algebras. The first section presents a proof of Engel’s theorem with the Jacobson refinement and some consequences. The second part deals with conjugacy of Cartan subalgebras and consequences.
